```cpp
#pragma once

#include <optional>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <rfl/json.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

namespace query_search_books_by_criteria {

struct Book {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> book_id;
  std::string title;
  std::string author;
  int year;
  std::string genre;
  double price;
};

struct BookFilters {
  std::optional<std::string> title_keyword;
  std::optional<int> min_year;
  std::optional<std::string> genre;
  std::optional<double> max_price;
};

std::vector<Book> query_search_books_by_criteria(const BookFilters& filters) {
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;

  // Connect to the database
  auto conn_result = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  if (!conn_result) {
    return {};
  }
  auto conn = *conn_result;

  // Build the condition dynamically
  auto condition = "book_id"_c == "book_id"_c;

  if (filters.title_keyword) {
    condition = condition && "title"_c.like("%" + *filters.title_keyword + "%");
  }
  if (filters.min_year) {
    condition = condition && ("year"_c >= *filters.min_year);
  }
  if (filters.genre) {
    condition = condition && ("genre"_c == *filters.genre);
  }
  if (filters.max_price) {
    condition = condition && ("price"_c <= *filters.max_price);
  }

  // Build the query
  auto query = sqlgen::select_from<Book>("book_id"_c, "title"_c, "author"_c, "year"_c, "genre"_c, "price"_c) 
               | sqlgen::where(condition);

  // Execute the query
  auto result = query(conn);
  if (result) {
    return *result;
  } else {
    return {};
  }
}

}  // namespace query_search_books_by_criteria
```

```cpp
#pragma once

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/literals.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/transpilation/to_sql.hpp>

namespace transaction_transfer_funds {

struct Account {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> account_id;
  double balance;
};

bool transfer_funds(int from_account_id, int to_account_id, double amount) {
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;

  auto account_id_c = "account_id"_c;
  auto balance_c = "balance"_c;

  auto conn_result = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  if (!conn_result) {
    return false;
  }
  auto conn = *conn_result;

  auto begin_result = conn->begin_transaction();
  if (!begin_result) {
    return false;
  }

  // Read the from_account
  auto from_account_result = (sqlgen::read<Account> | sqlgen::where(account_id_c == from_account_id))(conn);
  if (!from_account_result) {
    conn->rollback();
    return false;
  }
  auto& from_account = *from_account_result;

  if (from_account.balance < amount) {
    conn->rollback();
    return false;
  }

  // Create the update statements
  auto update_from = sqlgen::update<Account>(balance_c.set(balance_c - amount))
                     | sqlgen::where(account_id_c == from_account_id && balance_c >= amount);

  auto update_to = sqlgen::update<Account>(balance_c.set(balance_c + amount))
                   | sqlgen::where(account_id_c == to_account_id);

  // Execute the updates
  auto update_from_result = conn->execute(conn->to_sql(sqlgen::transpilation::to_sql(update_from)));
  if (!update_from_result) {
    conn->rollback();
    return false;
  }

  auto update_to_result = conn->execute(conn->to_sql(sqlgen::transpilation::to_sql(update_to)));
  if (!update_to_result) {
    conn->rollback();
    return false;
  }

  // Commit
  auto commit_result = conn->commit();
  if (!commit_result) {
    conn->rollback();
    return false;
  }

  return true;
}

}  // namespace transaction_transfer_funds
```

   #include <sqlgen.hpp>
   #include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
   #include <vector>
   #include <regex>

   namespace mathematical_operations_analysis {

   struct Product {
     sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;
     std::string name;
     double price;
     int quantity;
     double discount_rate;
   };

   struct MathAnalysis {
     int product_id;
     std::string name;
     double abs_price;
     double ceil_price;
     double floor_price;
     double rounded_price;
     double exp_discount;
     double ln_price;
     double log2_quantity;
     double sin_discount;
     double cos_discount;
     double tan_discount;
     double sqrt_quantity;
   };

   std::vector<MathAnalysis> analyze_mathematical_operations(const std::vector<Product>& products) {
     using namespace sqlgen::literals;

     // Connect to the database
     auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

     // Create a temporary table for Product
     conn.execute("CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE Product (product_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, price REAL NOT NULL, quantity INTEGER NOT NULL, discount_rate REAL NOT NULL)");

     // Insert the products
     auto insert_query = sqlgen::insert(products);
     insert_query(conn);

     // Build the query
     auto query = sqlgen::select<Product>(
         "product_id"_c,
         "name"_c,
         sqlgen::abs("price"_c) | sqlgen::as<"abs_price">,
         sqlgen::ceil("price"_c) | sqlgen::as<"ceil_price">,
         sqlgen::floor("price"_c) | sqlgen::as<"floor_price">,
         sqlgen::round("price"_c, 2) | sqlgen::as<"rounded_price">,
         sqlgen::exp("discount_rate"_c / 100) | sqlgen::as<"exp_discount">,
         sqlgen::ln("price"_c) | sqlgen::as<"ln_price">,
         sqlgen::log2("quantity"_c) | sqlgen::as<"log2_quantity">,
         sqlgen::sin("discount_rate"_c) | sqlgen::as<"sin_discount">,
         sqlgen::cos("discount_rate"_c) | sqlgen::as<"cos_discount">,
         sqlgen::tan("discount_rate"_c) | sqlgen::as<"tan_discount">,
         sqlgen::sqrt("quantity"_c) | sqlgen::as<"sqrt_quantity">
     ) | sqlgen::to<std::vector<MathAnalysis>>;

     // Execute the query and return the result
     return query(conn).value();
   }

   }  // namespace mathematical_operations_analysis

         sqlgen::sqrt("quantity"_c) | sqlgen::as<"sqrt_quantity">
     ) | sqlgen::to<std::vector<MathAnalysis>>;

     // Execute the query and return the result
     return query(conn).value();
   }
